mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM r_notice_post_t P WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (P.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR P.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))

SELECT P.NOTICE_ID AS noticeId, P.TITLE AS title, P.CONTENT AS content, P.IS_URGENT AS isUrgent, P.IS_PINNED AS isPinned, P.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, P.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS userName, P.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, P.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM r_notice_post_t P LEFT JOIN USER U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO r_notice_post_t (TITLE, CONTENT, IS_URGENT, IS_PINNED, USER_ID) VALUES (#{post.title}, #{post.content}, #{post.isUrgent}, #{post.isPinned}, #{post.userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE r_notice_post_t SET TITLE = #{post.title}, CONTENT = #{post.content}, IS_URGENT = #{post.isUrgent}, IS_PINNED = #{post.isPinned} WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
